reforms.description: New Acts on business associations and company registration were implemented to modernize legislation, speed up processing, and reduce administrative burdens for business start-ups.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The reform aims to facilitate the establishment of new businesses, which can enhance economic activity and job creation.
reforms.status_evidence: The Acts have been put into effect and are operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: While the reform is significant in modernizing business processes, it does not represent a structural overhaul of the innovation ecosystem.
reforms.source_quote: New Acts on business associations and company registration came into force in July 2006 that aimed to modernise legislation, speed-up processing and reduce administrative burdens.

reforms.description: The central government is encouraging municipalities to use micro-regions as a basis for joint provision of services, aiming to foster cooperation between small villages and larger settlements.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: This initiative promotes collaboration and resource sharing, which can enhance local economic development and support startups in smaller communities.
reforms.status_evidence: The initiative has been actively promoted and is in practice.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative is significant for local governance and service provision but does not constitute a major overhaul of the innovation framework.
reforms.source_quote: Central government is encouraging municipalities to use the micro-regions as a basis for joint provision.
